data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.name AS department_name, COUNT(p.id) AS professor_count
FROM public.departments AS d
LEFT JOIN public.professors AS p
  ON p.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY professor_count DESC, department_name ASC;

issues: Plan data_requirements listed filter 'professors.department_id IS NOT NULL' but the provided SQL uses a LEFT JOIN without that filter — result: departments with zero professors will appear, and professors with NULL department_id will not be represented as an 'Unassigned' bucket. Adjust SQL or the filter depending on whether you want to exclude NULLs or surface an Unassigned category.

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql:
SELECT d.name AS department_name, COUNT(p.id) AS professor_count
FROM public.departments AS d
LEFT JOIN public.professors AS p
  ON p.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY professor_count DESC, department_name ASC;
